name: Large Corporate Underpayment Interest Avoidance

eligibility.description: Applies to C corporations with underpayments exceeding $100,000; payment must be made within 30 days of the first letter of proposed deficiency.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Avoids the 2% increase in the underpayment interest rate (hot interest) for large corporate underpayments if the amount is paid in full within 30 days of the IRS notice.
